title: Minecraft Bedrock Local Light Settings 1.21.120
description: Local light settings for Vibrant Visuals. Assigns light colors and light types to specific block types such as torches.

format_version.description: The 3-part schema version for parsing these local light settings.

minecraft:local_light_settings.description: A map of block identifiers to their local light settings.

color.description: A color value expressed as either an RGB array of three numbers in the 0-255 range, or a six-digit hexadecimal string.

block_light_settings.description: Light settings for a specific block type.

light_color.description: The color of light the block emits. Supports RGB array or hexadecimal string. If not provided, the standard Minecraft light color is used.

light_type.description: The type of local light. Static lights are baked into the scene, while point lights produce sophisticated effects such as diffuse and specular highlights and dynamic shadows.
